title: Frankenclaw
relevance_summary: AI assistant with full shell access and persistence on user devices, leading to unauthorized access and potential malicious actions.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that originates from a known vulnerable AI service or bot.

red_flags: Full shell access and persistence on user devices without proper authentication.
No protection against unauthorized access or command execution.
monitoring_rules: Monitor for any calls to known vulnerable AI services or bots.
summary: OpenClaw, an AI assistant with full shell access and persistence, was exploited by scammers who used it to execute unauthorized actions and steal funds. A guard could have blocked transactions originating from known vulnerable AI services or bots.
